title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Shyaway

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Shyaway
jsonLd.description:
Shyaway invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shyaway:
Shyaway is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shyaway!
